MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556
  • Home
  • Development Library
  • Examples
  • Release Notes
C Sharp Examples

Magewell SDKv3 provides examples which are developed using CSharp. C# examples are saved in SDKv3\Examples\Legacy_C#(this folder will be deleted in the futher) and SDKv3\Examples\C#.

  1. AVCaptureCSharp SDKv3\Examples\Legacy_C#\GUI\AVCapture2CSharp
  2. AVCaptureCSharp2 SDKv3\Examples\Legacy_C#\GUI\AVCapture2CSharp
  3. av_record SDKv3\Examples\C#\all_example\av_record
  4. av_view SDKv3\Examples\C#\all_example\av_view
  5. av_view_quad SDKv3\Examples\C#\all_example\av_view_quad
  6. av_view_sharpen SDKv3\Examples\C#\all_example\av_view_sharpen
  7. color_conditioning SDKv3\Examples\C#\all_example\color_conditioning
  8. color_conditioning2 SDKv3\Examples\C#\all_example\color_conditioning2
  9. gpu_encode_gui SDKv3\Examples\C#\all_example\gpu_encode_gui

Overview

C# examples call SDKv3 functions, import dll using DllImport, and state the function prototype and related data structure in the program.

...
[StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential, CharSet = CharSet.Ansi, Pack = 1)]
public struct MWCAP_CHANNEL_INFO
{
public UInt16 wFamilyID;
public UInt16 wProductID;
public SByte chHardwareVersion;
public Byte byFirmwareID;
public UInt32 dwFirmwareVersion;
public UInt32 dwDriverVersion;
[MarshalAs(UnmanagedType.ByValTStr, SizeConst = 64)]
public string szFamilyName;
[MarshalAs(UnmanagedType.ByValTStr, SizeConst = 64)]
public string szProductName;
[MarshalAs(UnmanagedType.ByValTStr, SizeConst = 64)]
public string szFirmwareName;
[MarshalAs(UnmanagedType.ByValTStr, SizeConst = 16)]
public string szBoardSerialNo;
public Byte byBoardIndex;
public Byte byChannelIndex;
}
...
#if DEBUG
[DllImport("LibMWCaptured.dll", CallingConvention = CallingConvention.Cdecl)]
#else
[DllImport("LibMWCapture.dll", CallingConvention = CallingConvention.Cdecl)]
#endif
public static extern MW_RESULT MWGetVideoSignalStatus(IntPtr hChannel, IntPtr pSignalStatus);
...

The current C# eaxmples is based on the WinForm framework, include some of the functions of the LibMWCapture, mw_venc and mw_mp4 library, as well as some audio and video Render functions:

  1. Part of LibMWCapture library functions are defined in the dir: SDKv3\Examples\C#\all_example\common\mw_capture\LibMWCapture.cs
  2. Part of mw_venc library functions are defined in the dir: SDKv3\Examples\C#\all_example\common\mw_venc\mw_venc.cs

  3. Part of mw_mp4 library functions are defined in the dir: SDKv3\Examples\C#\all_example\common\mw_mp4\mw_mp4.cs

  4. Audio and video Render functions are in the dir: SDKv3\Examples\C#\all_example\common\LibMWMedia.cs

1. AVCaptureCSharp

AVCaptureCSharp: It demonstrates how to use Pro Capture Family Functions and Eco Capture Family Functions to render audio and video. It has the same function and program logic as AVCapture C++.

AVCaptureCSharp

2. AVCapture2CSharp

AVCapture2CSharp: It demonstrates how to use Universal Functions to render audio and video. It has the same function and logic as AVCapture2 C++.

AVCapture2CSharp

3. av_record

av_record captures A/V data using Easy to Use C# Capture Interface and plays the data. Then use mw_venc or ffmpeg encodes videos, use ffmpeg encodes audio, use mw_mp4 to encapsulate raw data in mp4.

av_record

4. av_view

av_view captures and plays A/V data using Easy to Use C# Capture Interface.

av_view

5. av_view_quad

av_view_quad demonstrates synchronized capture with multiple devices and previews four channels in one screen.

av_view_quad

6. av_view_sharpen

av_view_sharpen sharpens your videos. You can find a slider at the top of the window to adjust parameters about sharpening.

av_view_sharpen

7. color_conditioning

color_conditioning is a command-line program, demonstrating how to adjust the contrast, brightness, saturation and chroma, and generate 5 pictures, which have different contrast, brightness, saturation and chroma by using MWCapture SDKv3 Pro Capture Functions.

color_conditioning

8. color_conditioning2

color_conditioning2is a command-line program, demonstrating how to adjust the contrast, brightness, saturation and chroma, and generate 5 pictures, which have different contrast, brightness, saturation and chroma by using MWCapture SDKv3 Universal Functions.

color_conditioning2

9. gpu_encode_gui

gpu_encode_gui is a GPU hardware encoding program base on av_view. And it saves a test.h264 file by h264 encoding.

gpu_encode_gui
